nasb.text: So Joab and the people who were with him drew near to the battle against the Arameans, and they fled before him.

esv.text: So Joab and the people who were with him drew near to battle against the Syrians, and they fled before him.

cnv.text: 於是約押和與他在一起的人前進，攻擊亞蘭人；亞蘭人在約押面前逃跑。

ccb.text: 于是，约押率领军兵进攻亚兰人，亚兰人败逃。
